positive: Minimalist abstract woodland scene, stylized illustration, featuring a central, symmetrical arrangement of stylized forest elements: delicate, curving birch branches, plump mushrooms with geometric caps, and subtly glowing bioluminescent moss. The palette should consist of deep teal, muted forest green, earthy taupe, and accents of soft lavender and warm gold. The design should utilize negative space effectively, emphasizing clean silhouettes suitable for a repeat pattern or single-chest print. Graphic novel ink wash style with clean vector lines, strong contrast, and flat color blocking. High detail, central composition, isolated on a solid neutral background.
negative: blur, low resolution, bad anatomy, text, watermark, logo, signature, dirty, noise, artifacts, out of frame, extra limbs, abstract photo, photorealism
